zh.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole於1245年出生在義大利。她於1263年與Alberto I Della Scala在義大利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年1月1日在義大利維圖維洛納維洛納享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Verde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole was born in 1245, in Italy. She married Alberto I Della Scala in 1263, in Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 January 1307, in Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole est née en 1245, à Italie. Elle a épousé Alberto I Della Scala en 1263, à Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1307, à Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole wurde 1245 in Italien geboren. Sie hat 1263 in Italien Alberto I Della Scala geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1307 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole è nata il nel 1245 nel Italia. Lei sposato Alberto I Della Scala nel 1263, nel Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1307, nel Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzoleは1245年にイタリアで生まれた。1263年にイタリアでAlberto I Della Scalaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年1月1日にイタリアベンエトーバーオナバーオナで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole(은)는 1245년 이탈리아에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1263년 이탈리아에서 Alberto I Della Scala(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 1월 1일 이탈리아 븐토 베로나 베로나에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole nasceu em 1245, em Itália. Ela casou-se com Alberto I Della Scala em 1263, em Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1307, em Verona, Verona, Veneto, Itália, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole родилась в 1245 г. в местности Италия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alberto I Della Scala в 1263 г. в местности Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1307 г. в местности вирона, вирона, винето, Италия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Verde di Salizzole nació en 1245, en Italia. Se casó con Alberto I Della Scala en 1263, en Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1307, en Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 62 años.
